name: Iso11783IL_SetSignal
title: Iso11783IL_SetSignal
syntax: long Iso11783IL_SetSignal( dbSignal signal, double value );
description: Sets the signal to the specified physical value. The message of the signal is sent according the configured send type.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: signal name from databaseThe signal must be assigned to the node as Tx signal.
